summary: Iteration 84 - Testing Appro Manager (Shopping List) features. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: Admin sees Appro Manager tab with 3 sub-tabs (À ACHETER, ACHETÉ, CUMUL MODE DE PAIEMENT). Edit modal with PU/Qté and auto-calculated total works. Mark-done modal shows Fonds Propres and Caisse Restau payment mode buttons. Gérante correctly does NOT see Appro Manager tab (admin-only).
critical_code_review_comments: All Appro Manager (Shopping List) backend endpoints working correctly:
- POST /api/shopping-list/{id}/done with payment_mode=fonds_propres: Sets payment_mode + reimbursed=false + status=done
- POST /api/shopping-list/{id}/done with payment_mode=caisse_restau: Sets payment_mode + status=done (no reimbursed field)
- POST /api/shopping-list/{id}/done with invalid payment_mode: Returns 400
- POST /api/shopping-list/{id}/done without payment_mode: Still works (backward compat)
- PATCH /api/shopping-list/{id} with quantity/estimated_unit_price: Recalculates estimated_total
- PATCH /api/shopping-list/{id} with real_unit_price: Recalculates real_total
- POST /api/shopping-list/{id}/reimburse: Sets reimbursed=true, reimbursed_at, reimbursed_by
- POST /api/shopping-list/{id}/reimburse: Fails if not fonds_propres or already reimbursed
- POST /api/shopping-list/reimburse-all: Bulk reimburse returns count + total_amount
- POST /api/shopping-list/{id}/undo: Resets payment_mode, reimbursed, reimbursed_at to null
- GET /api/shopping-list/payment-mode-cumul: Returns correct structure with fonds_propres (total, count, reimbursed_*, pending_*) and caisse_restau (total, count)
- GET /api/cash-closures/live: Includes shopping_list items in fonds_propres_pending_total and fonds_propres_reimbursed_today_total
- POST /api/shopping-list/to-expense: Regression test passes - transfer still works
Frontend role-based visibility working correctly:
- Admin: Sees 'Appro Manager' tab with 3 sub-tabs (À ACHETER, ACHETÉ, CUMUL MODE DE PAIEMENT)
- Admin: Edit modal shows Quantité, Prix unitaire (F), and auto-calculated TOTAL
- Admin: Mark-done modal shows 'Fonds Propres' and 'Caisse Restau' payment mode buttons
- Admin: CUMUL tab shows Fonds Propres and Caisse Restau cards with reimbursement breakdown
- Gérante: Does NOT see 'Appro Manager' tab (admin-only feature)
seed_data_creation: Test shopping_list items created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 confirmed Appro Manager (Shopping List) features are fully functional. Key behaviors tested: (1) mark-done with fonds_propres/caisse_restau payment modes, (2) reimburse individual and bulk, (3) undo resets all payment fields, (4) payment-mode-cumul endpoint returns correct structure, (5) cash-closures/live snapshot includes shopping_list items in fonds_propres fields, (6) PATCH recalculates estimated_total and real_total, (7) to-expense transfer still works (regression). Frontend: Admin sees Appro Manager with 3 sub-tabs, edit modal with auto-calc total, mark-done modal with payment mode selector. Gérante does NOT see Appro Manager tab.
features_tested: Old items without payment_mode still work
Frontend: Admin sees Appro Manager with 3 sub-tabs
Frontend: Edit modal with PU/Qté and auto-calculated total
Frontend: Mark-done modal with payment mode selector
Frontend: CUMUL tab shows Fonds Propres and Caisse Restau cards
Frontend: Gérante does NOT see Appro Manager tab
